title: Review Startup Shortcut Feature Scope
description: Session 6 added Tools > Create Startup Shortcut. Creates .lnk via WScript.Shell COM. Review: Should it detect existing shortcuts and offer update/remove? Should it validate target BAT exists? Edge case: user moves workspace folder after creating shortcut.
notes: Contemplation: Shortcut management lifecycle. Consider a 'Remove Startup Shortcut' companion option.
